note_text:
Subjective: Patient reports pain at Right cervical wound site, rates 8/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Abscess abscess Right cervical measures 0.5 cm x 1.2 cm x 0.2 cm.
  Wound bed: 49% slough, 51% granulation tissue. Periwound: macerated.
  Drainage: moderate. Odor: present, foul.
Assessment: Abscess abscess Right cervical — improving.
Plan: Physician notified of wound progression. Alginate dressing applied.
